name: One Product. Complete Daily Nutrition.
description: Balanced Daily Nutrition in One Product
ingredientsDescription: Each tablet contains a powerful blend of premium ingredients scientifically formulated to support complete wellness. Omega-3 (500mg) provides essential fatty acids for brain, heart, and joint health. A complete B-Complex ensures optimal energy metabolism and mental focus. Biotin strengthens hair and nails while supporting skin elasticity. Vitamin C and E work as powerful antioxidants to protect against cellular damage. Zinc and selenium boost immune function and reduce inflammation. Magnesium supports muscle relaxation and stress relief. Vitamin D3 enhances calcium absorption for strong bones. This comprehensive formula delivers 36+ essential nutrients in one convenient daily dose.

benefits.title: Boosts Focus & Brain Function
benefits.description: Thanks to high-purity Omega-3 and a full B-vitamin complex that supports cognitive health.
benefits.descriptionAr: بفضل أوميغا-3 عالية النقاء ومركب فيتامين ب الكامل الذي يدعم الصحة الإدراكية.

benefits.title: Fights Fatigue & Supports Daily Energy
benefits.description: With vitamin B5 and magnesium to enhance physical and mental performance.
benefits.descriptionAr: مع فيتامين B5 والمغنيسيوم لتحسين الأداء البدني والذهني.

benefits.title: Improves Skin Radiance & Reduces Wrinkles
benefits.description: Omega-3 combined with vitamin C and biotin helps nourish skin and promote collagen production.
benefits.descriptionAr: أوميغا-3 مع فيتامين C والبيوتين يساعد على تغذية البشرة وتعزيز إنتاج الكولاجين.

benefits.title: Strengthens Hair & Nails
benefits.description: Biotin and zinc promote healthy hair growth and improve nail strength.
benefits.descriptionAr: البيوتين والزنك يعززان نمو الشعر الصحي ويحسنان قوة الأظافر.

benefits.title: Supports Immunity & Cellular Protection
benefits.description: With selenium, zinc, vitamin C, and D3 for strong immune defense and antioxidant action.
benefits.descriptionAr: مع السيلينيوم والزنك وفيتامين C و D3 للدفاع المناعي القوي والعمل المضاد للأكسدة.

ingredients.name: Omega-3 (500 mg)
ingredients.description: Supports brain, heart, joints, and reduces inflammation.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يدعم الدماغ والقلب والمفاصل ويقلل الالتهاب.

ingredients.name: Zinc
ingredients.description: Boosts immune system, promotes wound healing, and strengthens hair and nails.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يعزز جهاز المناعة ويعزز التئام الجروح ويقوي الشعر والأظافر.

ingredients.name: Biotin
ingredients.description: Enhances hair growth, improves skin elasticity, and supports metabolism.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يعزز نمو الشعر ويحسن مرونة البشرة ويدعم الأيض.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid)
ingredients.description: Reduces mental fatigue and supports energy metabolism.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يقلل التعب العقلي ويدعم استقلاب الطاقة.

ingredients.name: Magnesium
ingredients.description: Vital for nerve and muscle health; reduces stress and muscle cramps.
ingredients.descriptionAr: حيوي لصحة الأعصاب والعضلات؛ يقلل التوتر وتقلصات العضلات.

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3
ingredients.description: Enhances calcium absorption and strengthens bones and immunity.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يعزز امتصاص الكالسيوم ويقوي العظام والمناعة.

ingredients.name: Vitamin C
ingredients.description: A powerful antioxidant that supports skin health and immune defense.
ingredients.descriptionAr: مضاد أكسدة قوي يدعم صحة البشرة والدفاع المناعي.

ingredients.name: B-Complex (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12)
ingredients.nameAr: مركب ب (B1، B2، B3، B6، B12)
ingredients.description: Supports mood, focus, and energy production.
ingredients.descriptionAr: يدعم الحالة المزاجية والتركيز وإنتاج الطاقة.

whyStandOut: No fish oil – 100% pure Omega-3 without the fishy smell or aftertaste.
Single daily capsule – Get your Omega-3 + essential vitamins and minerals all in one.
Advanced formula – Combines brain, skin, and immune health into one convenient dose.
whyStandOutAr: لا توجد زيوت سمك - 100٪ أوميغا-3 نقي بدون رائحة السمك أو الطعم الغير محبب.
كبسولة يومية واحدة - احصل على أوميغا-3 + الفيتامينات والمعادن الأساسية كل ذلك في واحد.
صيغة متقدمة - تجمع بين صحة الدماغ والجلد والمناعة في جرعة واحدة مريحة.
howToUse: It is preferable to consume the medicine based on the doctor's guidance, to obtain the appropriate dose.
Food supplements should be as part of varied and balanced diet.
howToUseAr: من الأفضل تناول الدواء بناءً على توجيهات الطبيب للحصول على الجرعة المناسبة.
يجب أن تكون المكملات الغذائية جزءاً من نظام غذائي متنوع ومتوازن.
fullDescription: What's Inside – and Why It Works: Boosts Focus & Brain Function thanks to high-purity Omega-3 and a full B-vitamin complex that supports cognitive health. Fights Fatigue & Supports Daily Energy with vitamin B5 and magnesium to enhance physical and mental performance. Improves Skin Radiance & Reduces Wrinkles - Omega-3 combined with vitamin C and biotin helps nourish skin and promote collagen production. Strengthens Hair & Nails - Biotin and zinc promote healthy hair growth and improve nail strength. Supports Immunity & Cellular Protection with selenium, zinc, vitamin C, and D3 for strong immune defense and antioxidant action. Active and Essential Ingredients: Omega-3 (500 mg) supports brain, heart, joints, and reduces inflammation. Zinc boosts immune system, promotes wound healing, and strengthens hair and nails. Biotin enhances hair growth, improves skin elasticity, and supports metabolism. Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid) reduces mental fatigue and supports energy metabolism. Magnesium vital for nerve and muscle health; reduces stress and muscle cramps. Vitamin D3 enhances calcium absorption and strengthens bones and immunity. Vitamin C a powerful antioxidant that supports skin health and immune defense. B-Complex (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12) supports mood, focus, and energy production. Why VERA MEGA Stands Out: No fish oil – 100% pure Omega-3 without the fishy smell or aftertaste. Single daily capsule – Get your Omega-3 + essential vitamins and minerals all in one. Advanced formula – Combines brain, skin, and immune health into one convenient dose. How to Use: Chew one tablet daily. It is preferable to consume the medicine based on the doctor's guidance, to obtain the appropriate dose. Food supplements should be as part of varied and balanced diet.

name: Fertility & Vitality in One Chew – For Men & Women
description: Advanced Chewable Formula with Vitamins, Minerals, Inositols & Antioxidants
ingredientsDescription: A scientifically balanced formula designed to support reproductive health in both men and women. Powered by Myo-Inositol (1100 mg) and D-Chiro Inositol (50 mg) to promote hormonal balance and healthy metabolic function. Enhanced with CoQ10, L-Arginine, N-Acetyl Cysteine, and Alpha Lipoic Acid to provide antioxidant protection and support egg and sperm vitality. Fortified with essential fertility nutrients including Vitamin D3, Vitamin C, Vitamin B6, Folate, Vitamin B12, Biotin, Zinc, Selenium, and Chromium to help maintain normal reproductive function, hormonal balance, and overall wellness. This comprehensive blend creates a strong nutritional foundation for couples seeking balanced reproductive support as part of a healthy lifestyle.

benefits.title: Supports Female Ovulation & Egg Health
benefits.titleAr: يدعم الإباضة وصحة البويضات لدى النساء
benefits.description: Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro Inositol help regulate menstrual cycles, improve ovulation, and enhance egg quality, especially beneficial for women with PCOS.
benefits.descriptionAr: ميو-إينوسيتول ود-كيرو إينوسيتول يساعدان في تنظيم دورات الحيض وتحسين الإباضة وتعزيز جودة البويضات، خاصة للنساء المصابات بتكيس المبايض.

benefits.title: Enhances Male Fertility & Sperm Quality
benefits.titleAr: يعزز خصوبة الرجال وجودة الحيوانات المنوية
benefits.description: L-Arginine, Zinc, and Selenium support sperm count, motility, and overall male reproductive health.
benefits.descriptionAr: إل-أرجينين والزنك والسيلينيوم يدعمون عدد الحيوانات المنوية وحركتها والصحة الإنجابية العامة للرجال.

benefits.title: Balances Hormones & Metabolic Health
benefits.description: D-Chiro Inositol enhances insulin sensitivity and supports healthy hormonal balance.
benefits.descriptionAr: د-كيرو إينوسيتول يعزز حساسية الأنسولين ويدعم التوازن الهرموني الصحي.

benefits.title: Powerful Antioxidant Protection
benefits.description: N-Acetyl Cysteine, Vitamin C, Co-Q10, and Alpha Lipoic Acid protect reproductive cells from oxidative stress, supporting healthy fertility.
benefits.descriptionAr: ن-أسيتيل سيستين وفيتامين C وCo-Q10 وحمض ألفا ليبويك يحمون الخلايا الإنجابية من الإجهاد التأكسدي ويدعمون الخصوبة الصحية.

benefits.title: Complete Nutritional Support for Fertility
benefits.description: Includes Folic Acid, Vitamin B12, Vitamin B6, Biotin, and Vitamin D3 to support cellular health, energy metabolism, and reproductive wellness.
benefits.descriptionAr: يحتوي على حمض الفوليك وفيتامين B12 وB6 والبيوتين وD3 لدعم صحة الخلايا واستقلاب الطاقة والصحة الإنجابية.

benefits.title: Boosts Energy & Cellular Function
benefits.description: Co-Q10, Vitamin B-complex, and L-Arginine enhance cellular energy, helping your body support reproductive processes efficiently.
benefits.descriptionAr: Co-Q10 ومركب فيتامين ب وإل-أرجينين يعززون طاقة الخلايا ويساعدون جسمك على دعم العمليات الإنجابية بكفاءة.

benefits.title: Easy-to-Take Daily Chewable
benefits.description: Designed for adults, one chewable tablet provides a complete blend of nutrients for daily fertility support in a convenient form for both men and women.
benefits.descriptionAr: مصمم للبالغين، قرص مضغ واحد يوفر مزيجًا كاملًا من المغذيات لدعم الخصوبة اليومي بشكل مريح للرجال والنساء.

ingredients.name: Myo-Inositol (1100 mg)
ingredients.description: Improves ovulation and egg quality, especially in PCOS. Improves sperm motility and metabolic function.

ingredients.name: D-Chiro Inositol (50 mg)
ingredients.description: Enhances insulin signaling & Supports ovarian function and sperm quality .

ingredients.name: N-Acetyl Cysteine (100 mg)
ingredients.description: Supports ovulation and reduces oxidative stress. Improves sperm motility, count, and quality.

ingredients.name: L-Arginine (150 mg)
ingredients.description: Improves blood flow to reproductive organs. Supports ovulation and sperm production.

ingredients.name: Coenzyme Q10 (100 mg)
ingredients.description: Powerful antioxidant for sperm and egg protection and quality. Boosts cell energy for fertilization.

ingredients.name: Alpha Lipoic Acid (50 mg)
ingredients.description: Improve insulin resistance and egg quality. Improve sperm count, motility and DNA quality.

ingredients.name: Zinc (15 mg)
ingredients.description: Supports testosterone and sperm quality in men. Aids egg maturation and ovulation in women.

ingredients.name: Selenium (55 mcg)
ingredients.description: Protects sperm and eggs from oxidative damage. Improves sperm motility and morphology.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B6 (2.1 mg)
ingredients.description: Helps regulate menstrual cycles in women. Supports testosterone levels in men.

ingredients.name: Folic Acid B9 (200 mcg)
ingredients.description: Prevents neural tube defects in pregnancy. Improves egg and sperm DNA quality.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B12 (2.5 mcg)
ingredients.description: Supports sperm formation, count, and DNA stability. Improves ovulation and embryo implantation.

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3 (10 mcg)
ingredients.description: Supports healthy skin, hair, and nails during fertility and pregnancy. Aids in energy metabolism.

ingredients.name: Vitamin C (60 mg)
ingredients.description: Protects sperm and eggs from oxidative stress. Improves sperm quality and nutrient absorption.

ingredients.name: Biotin (50 mcg)
ingredients.description: Aids in metabolic and hormonal balance. Supports energy metabolism for sperm production.

ingredients.name: Chromium picolinate (200 mcg)
ingredients.description: Beneficial for PCOS management and metabolic balance linked to fertility.

whyStandOut: Clinically researched ingredients proven to support reproductive wellness.
whyStandOutAr: مكونات مدروسة سريرياً ثبت أنها تدعم الصحة الإنجابية
دعم شامل بمضادات الأكسدة والعناصر الغذائية
howToUse: Food supplements should be as part of varied and balanced diet.
Food supplements should be as part of varied and balanced diet.
Used under medical supervision, keep away from the children.
Not for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women.
Do not exceed the recommended daily dose.
Consult a physician before using it if you have any chronic medical conditions or are taking any medications.
howToUseAr: يجب أن تكون المكملات الغذائية جزءاً من نظام غذائي متنوع ومتوازن.
تُستخدم تحت إشراف طبي، يُحفظ بعيداً عن متناول الأطفال.
غير مناسب للاستخدام من قبل النساء الحوامل أو المرضعات.
غير مناسب للاستخدام من قبل الأطفال.
لا تتجاوز الجرعة اليومية الموصى بها.
استشر الطبيب قبل استخدامه إذا كان لديك أي حالات طبية مزمنة أو تتناول أي أدوية.
fullDescription: A daily chewable packed with essential nutrients and antioxidants to naturally support reproductive health and overall wellness.
